reviews.comment:
Todos los servicios. Siempre hay mucha Fila de autos para recargar combustible y seguir viaje. Mientras, unos minutos para estirar piernas, el aseo y una colación! :)

(Translated by Google)
All services available. There's always a long line of cars waiting to refuel and continue their journey. While waiting, I took a few minutes to stretch my legs, freshen up, and have a snack! :)
